channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: No Concerts, No Problem: Trump Plans 'Great American State Fair' For US' 250th Anniversary

media:content.media:description: Trump was dismissive of the acts that backed out.

item.description: Trump's social media post twice referenced him holding a rally "Wednesday," without a specific date.
item.content:encoded: Trump's social media post twice referenced him holding a rally "Wednesday," without a specific date.

item.title: US Struck Commercial Ship Trying To Breach Blockade 'After 20 Warnings', Reach Iran

media:content.media:description: With the latest action, US military has stopped six ships trying to breach the blockade.

item.description: The Gambia-flagged cargo ship Lian Star ignored more than 20 warnings from US forces overnight as it tried to enter an Iranian port.
item.content:encoded: The Gambia-flagged cargo ship Lian Star ignored more than 20 warnings from US forces overnight as it tried to enter an Iranian port.

item.title: US Says Capable Of Resuming War With Iran As Deal Remains Elusive

media:content.media:description: Despite a ceasefire that has largely held since April, there have been occasional flare-ups.

item.description: The United States warned on Saturday it was "more than capable" of resuming its war with Iran after President Donald Trump said any peace deal must adhere to his red lines, including Tehran...
item.content:encoded: The United States warned on Saturday it was "more than capable" of resuming its war with Iran after President Donald Trump said any peace deal must adhere to his red lines, including Tehran...

item.title: Sue Tilley Met Lucian Freud In 1990s. Her Nude Painting Could Now Fetch $47 Million

media:content.media:description: Sue Tilley hasn't seen any of the millions that the portraits have fetched at auction.

item.description: Lucian Freud, a grandson of psychoanalyst Sigmund Freud, is famed for fleshy nudes of friends, family and the artist himself.
item.content:encoded: Lucian Freud, a grandson of psychoanalyst Sigmund Freud, is famed for fleshy nudes of friends, family and the artist himself.

item.title: Video: Meteor Explodes Over US With Force Equal To 300 Tonnes Of TNT, NASA Confirms

media:content.media:description: NASA said it was a "natural object".

item.description: According to the United States Geological Survey (USGS), it was a "widely felt sonic boom from a suspected bolide".
item.content:encoded: According to the United States Geological Survey (USGS), it was a "widely felt sonic boom from a suspected bolide".

item.title: 'George Floyd'-style Death Triggers Protests In Dublin

media:content.media:description: The case has sparked a strong reaction among Ireland's black and African communities.

item.description: Protesters in Dublin demanded "justice" Saturday for a Congolese man who died after he was restrained by security guards, in an incident likened to George Floyd's murder in...
item.content:encoded: Protesters in Dublin demanded "justice" Saturday for a Congolese man who died after he was restrained by security guards, in an incident likened to George Floyd's murder in...

item.title: Iran War Highlights: Trump's Meet With Aides Ends Without "Final Determination"
item.description: US Iran War LIVE Updates: US President Donald Trump had on Wednesday dismissed an Iranian state media report that Iran and Oman would jointly manage shipping through the Strait of Hormuz
item.content:encoded: US Iran War LIVE Updates: US President Donald Trump had on Wednesday dismissed an Iranian state media report that Iran and Oman would jointly manage shipping through the Strait of Hormuz

item.title: Truck Carrying Returning Refugees Crashes In Eastern Afghanistan, Killing 22

media:content.media:description: 22 people were killed and about 36 injured.

item.description: The accident occurred when the truck fell into a ditch after the driver fell asleep.
item.content:encoded: The accident occurred when the truck fell into a ditch after the driver fell asleep.

item.title: Ukraine Is Using Soldiers That Don't Need Food Or Water To Kill Russians

media:content.media:description: Ukraine's growing reliance on automation is partly driven by necessity

item.description: Drones, robotic vehicles and remotely controlled weapons platforms are now playing a growing role in Kyiv's war effort, giving it a technological advantage against a larger Russian force.
item.content:encoded: Drones, robotic vehicles and remotely controlled weapons platforms are now playing a growing role in Kyiv's war effort, giving it a technological advantage against a larger Russian force.

item.title: US Aircraft Fires Missile At Ship For Iran Blockade Violation

media:content.media:description: The statement did not mention if there were any injuries aboard the Lian Star. (Representational)

item.description: The United States has been enforcing a blockade of Iranian ports as Tehran effectively halts all traffic through the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: The United States has been enforcing a blockade of Iranian ports as Tehran effectively halts all traffic through the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: As The War Rages In Iran, Tensions Brew In Other Parts Of The World

media:content.media:description: Nuclear push, unpredictable conflicts are being witnessed in the Eastern Hemisphere.

item.description: North Korea's nuclear defiance, a drone strike in Romania, China's silo expansion and Kazakhstan's offer to store Tehran's uranium stockpile present themselves as multiple flashpoints.
item.content:encoded: North Korea's nuclear defiance, a drone strike in Romania, China's silo expansion and Kazakhstan's offer to store Tehran's uranium stockpile present themselves as multiple flashpoints.

item.title: 9 With Links To Pak's ISI, Dawood Ibrahim Arrested, Were Planning Attacks In Delhi, Mumbai

media:content.media:description: A large quantity of ammunition and weapons was also recovered from their possession

item.description: The Delhi Police's Special Cell said the accused are residents of Delhi, Mumbai, and Punjab, and some are foreign nationals.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1106325/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>The Delhi Police's Special Cell said the accused are residents of Delhi, Mumbai, and Punjab, and some are foreign nationals.

item.title: Trump Aide Warns US "More Than Capable" Of Restarting Iran War

media:content.media:description: Trump said his priorities in any deal include Iran agreeing to never develop nuclear weapons.

item.description: The White House had signalled Trump was close to a decision on a potential deal, though Tehran denied there was a final agreement on ending the conflict.
item.content:encoded: The White House had signalled Trump was close to a decision on a potential deal, though Tehran denied there was a final agreement on ending the conflict.

item.title: How Iran's Hardliners Are Trying To Sabotage A Peace Deal With US

media:content.media:description: State television has criticised negotiations and portrayed talks as unsuccessful

item.description: The hard-line opposition was on full display during a rally in Tehran on Friday, where supporters packed the streets carrying flags and calling for continued resistance.
item.content:encoded: The hard-line opposition was on full display during a rally in Tehran on Friday, where supporters packed the streets carrying flags and calling for continued resistance.

item.title: 22 Dead As Truck Carrying Refugees From Pakistan Overturns In Afghanistan

media:content.media:description: The passengers were among thousands of Afghans who recently returned from Pakistan.

item.description: Among the dead were 10 children and five women, and the injured were taken to hospitals in Nangarhar.
item.content:encoded: Among the dead were 10 children and five women, and the injured were taken to hospitals in Nangarhar.

item.title: Netanyahu Worried Trump May Strike A "Bad Interim Deal" With Iran: Report

media:content.media:description: Israeli officials say Netanyahu has pushed for strikes on Iran's oil facilities.

item.description: For Israel, concerns remain that any emerging deal may leave out key issues such as Iran’s enriched uranium stockpile, its missile programme and support for regional proxy groups.
item.content:encoded: For Israel, concerns remain that any emerging deal may leave out key issues such as Iran’s enriched uranium stockpile, its missile programme and support for regional proxy groups.

item.title: Broke Pakistan Is Burning A Million Dollars On Image Makeover In The US

media:content.media:description: Amid domestic headwinds, many analysts believe that 'image makeover' will be an uphill task.

item.description: Pakistan has signed a $1.3 million lobbying deal in Washington to refurbish its global image and push its strategic interests in US policy
item.content:encoded: Pakistan has signed a $1.3 million lobbying deal in Washington to refurbish its global image and push its strategic interests in US policy

item.title: US' U-Turn On Green Card Rules, Most Immigrants Won't Have To Leave America

media:content.media:description: DHS said on Friday that there had been no broad policy change.

item.description: The US Department of Homeland Security has clarified that most immigrants applying for green cards will not need to leave the United States while their applications are processed.
item.content:encoded: The US Department of Homeland Security has clarified that most immigrants applying for green cards will not need to leave the United States while their applications are processed.

item.title: "Rightful Alarm In Asia": Top Trump Aide's Warning On China Military Build-Up
item.description: Pete Hegseth stressed that Washington did not seek "needless confrontation in the region".
item.content:encoded: Pete Hegseth stressed that Washington did not seek "needless confrontation in the region".

item.title: US Sanctions Iranian Buyers Of Military Technology
item.description: The United States announced Friday that it is "dismantling a sophisticated Iranian network" used to...
item.content:encoded: The United States announced Friday that it is "dismantling a sophisticated Iranian network" used to...
